tickets.title: Login page returns 500 error
tickets.description: Users are encountering a 500 Internal Server Error when attempting to log in to the dashboard. The issue started after the latest deployment at 2:00 PM. Affects all browsers. Auth service logs show connection timeout to the user database.

tickets.title: Add dark mode to dashboard
tickets.description: Feature request to add a dark mode theme to the main dashboard. Users have requested this in the feedback survey. Should support both system preference detection and manual toggle. Low contrast mode should also be considered for accessibility.

tickets.title: How to export monthly reports?
tickets.description: I need to export monthly usage reports for our finance team. I've looked through the settings but can't find the export option. Is this feature available, and if so, where can I find it?

tickets.title: API rate limiter not enforcing limits
tickets.description: The API rate limiter is configured for 100 requests per minute but is allowing up to 200 requests before throttling. This was discovered during load testing. The middleware configuration appears correct, but the counter reset logic may have a race condition.

tickets.title: Password reset email not received
tickets.description: Multiple users report not receiving password reset emails. The email service logs show messages being queued but delivery status is unknown. Possible issues with the SMTP relay or spam filtering. Affects users across all email providers.

tickets.title: Add SSO support for Azure AD
tickets.description: Enterprise customers are requesting Azure Active Directory SSO integration. We currently support Okta and Google Workspace. Azure AD SAML integration would cover approximately 40% of our enterprise customer base that cannot currently use SSO.

tickets.title: Dashboard loading slowly (>10 seconds)
tickets.description: The main dashboard takes over 10 seconds to load for users with large datasets (>10,000 records). The issue appears to be related to the analytics widget making unoptimized database queries. Previously loaded in under 2 seconds.

tickets.title: Update billing FAQ page
tickets.description: The billing FAQ page contains outdated information about our pricing tiers. The new pricing structure was rolled out last month but the FAQ still references the old tiers. Need to update pricing tables and add new FAQ entries about annual billing discounts.

comments.author: support-team
comments.content: Investigating — the 500 error appears related to the auth service deployment at 2:00 PM. Rolling back the deployment to verify.

comments.author: alice@example.com
comments.content: Still happening after clearing cookies and trying in incognito mode. Confirmed on Chrome, Firefox, and Safari.

comments.author: backend-team
comments.content: Root cause identified: the auth service connection pool was exhausted due to a configuration change. Reverting the pool size to 50 connections.

comments.author: support-team
comments.content: You can export reports from Settings → Reports → Export CSV. We also have a KB article 'Monthly Report Export Guide' that walks through the steps. Marking as resolved.

comments.author: dave@example.com
comments.content: Rate limiter allows 200 req/min instead of configured 100. Tested using Apache Bench with 300 concurrent requests.

comments.author: backend-team
comments.content: Bug confirmed — the sliding window counter has a race condition when multiple instances reset simultaneously. Fix PR #427 is in review.

comments.author: backend-team
comments.content: Profiling shows the analytics widget runs 3 unindexed queries on the events table. Adding composite indexes should reduce load time to under 2 seconds.
